bead.title: Forward Fizeau events opaquely and keep only final-result adapter
bead.description: Reduce DDx's Fizeau service consumption to opaque event forwarding plus final-result projection for DDx bookkeeping. DDx may decode Fizeau final/routing data needed for Result fields, but must not reconstruct tool transcripts, render progress semantics, or synthesize runtime outcomes. In-scope files: cli/internal/agent/agent_runner_service.go, cli/internal/agent/service_run.go, worker/server progress surfaces, run/session index fields that store Fizeau event/artifact references. Out of scope: Fizeau event schema changes.
bead.acceptance:
1. DDx stores or forwards Fizeau ServiceEvents without modifying their payloads.
2. DDx final adapter decodes only final status/output/tokens/cost/actual route/session artifact fields needed for DDx Result.
3. DDx does not reconstruct tool-call transcripts from Fizeau events for policy decisions.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent ./internal/server -run 'Test.*Service|Test.*Run|Test.*Worker|Test.*ToolCall' -count=1 passes.

governing.title: Feature: DDx Agent Service (consumer of ddx-agent contract)
